zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys於1080年出生在英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普時，他的父親Ribald de Bretagne31歲，母親Beatrix de Taillebois13歲。他和Agatha de Brus至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1168年在英國越可爾米德勒哈姆享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾米德勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys于1080年出生在英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普时，他的父亲Ribald de Bretagne31岁，母亲Beatrix de Taillebois13岁。他和Agatha de Brus至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1168年在英国越可爾米德勒哈姆享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾米德勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tailboys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Talboys
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Taillebois (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys was born in 1080, in Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Ribald de Bretagne, was 31 and his mother, Beatrix de Taillebois, was 13. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Agatha de Brus. He died in 1168, in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Middleham, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys est né en 1080, à Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Ribald de Bretagne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Taillebois, avait 13 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Agatha de Brus. Il est décédé en 1168, à Middleham, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Middleham, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys 1080 in Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ribald de Bretagne 31 und seine Mutter Beatrix de Taillebois 13. Er hatte mit Agatha de Brus mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1168 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Middleham, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Middleham, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys è nato il nel 1080 nel Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Ribald de Bretagne, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix de Taillebois, aveva 13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Agatha de Brus. Morì nel 1168, nel Middleham, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Middleham, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスソルペ
ja.St Mary and St Alkelda Churchyard, Middl: イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアミッドレハム

ja.Middleham, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレハム
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboysが1080年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスソルペで生まれた時，父Ribald de Bretagneは31歳，母Beatrix de Tailleboisは13歳であった。彼はAgatha de Brusとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1168年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレハムで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアミッドレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys(이)가 1080년 영국 링코실르 그림스소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ribald de Bretagne(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix de Taillebois(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Agatha de Brus(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1168년 영국 요르크실르 미들레함에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 미들레함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys nasceu em 1080, em Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ribald de Bretagne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Taillebois, tinha 13 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Agatha de Brus. Ele faleceu em 1168, em Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Middleham, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph FitzRibald de Tailboys родился в 1080 г. в местности гримстаурп, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ribald de Bretagne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Taillebois, 13. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Agatha de Brus. Он умер в 1168 г. в местности миддлэам, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлэам, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Agatha de Brus. Murió en 1168, en Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en Middleham, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
